title: zahar #2094
definition:
1) to admonish, warn, teach, shine, send out light, be light, be shining
    1a) (Niphal) to be taught, be admonished
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to teach, warn
        1b2) to shine, send out light (fig.)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to admonish, warn, teach, shine, send out light, be light, be shining
    1a) (Niphal) to be taught, be admonished
    1b) (Hiphil)
        1b1) to teach, warn
        1b2) to shine, send out light (fig.)

    NASB:  to be light or shining
